claims.claim: TASE switched from a Sunday-Thursday to a Monday-Friday trading week on 5 January 2026. Continuous trading Mon-Thu 09:59-17:14 (closing auction to 17:25), Friday 09:59-13:50; no trading Saturday, Sunday, or Jewish holidays. Equity settlement is T+1.
TASE index IDs used in market.tase.co.il/en/market_data/index/{id}/ and the OpenAPI: TA-35=142, TA-125=137, TA-90=143, TA-Bank=194, TA-RealEstate=149, TA-Technology=169.
TASE securities numbers: 662577 = Bank Hapoalim (alpha symbol POLI), 604611 = Bank Leumi (alpha symbol LUMI). Alpha symbols are long-standing, not introduced in 2026.

Israeli capital gains tax on securities: 25% for individuals (Section 91(b)(1)), 30% for substantial shareholders >10% (Section 91(b)(2)), 23% corporate (Section 126(a)); plus a surtax (mas yesef, Section 121B) of up to 5% (3% base + 2% from 2025) on capital income above ~721,560 NIS/yr (2025-2027).
claims.raw_snippet: capital gains Form 1322 Section 102 Section 20 15% 721,560 ש"ח 721,560 NIS https://taxsummaries.pwc.com/israel

claims.claim: The TASE Data Hub OpenAPI uses an OAuth2 client-credentials flow: token endpoint https://openapigw.tase.co.il/tase/prod/oauth/oauth2/token, gateway base https://openapigw.tase.co.il/tase/prod/, developer portal https://openapi.tase.co.il/tase/prod/, Data Hub https://datahub.tase.co.il/. Some products require a paid subscription.
Maya (maya.tase.co.il) is the TASE disclosure system for immediate/periodic reports, shelf offerings, and insider trades.

Illustrative worked-example amounts and standard conventions (not all are indexed constants): example Teva sale gain 120,000-80,000=40,000 NIS, tax at 25% = 10,000 NIS; prices quoted in agorot (1/100 shekel); illustrative index weights and percentages (8.2%, 6.29%, 0.71%) flagged as placeholders.
